entry.title: While creating payment proposal getting error message as BTE 00001820 is active (see long text)
entry.content:
We are getting error message as BTE 00001820 is active (see long text) with Message no. FZ396, its not allowing for payment.

 

Here documents are consisting with one invoice and one vendor credit memo

entry.title: Automatic Payment Reconciliation Using Japan Invoice Summary
entry.content:
Dear expert,

I’m raising this to seek further clarification regarding the automatic payment reconciliation functionality regarding the Japan Invoice Summary.

Based on my understanding, there are two approaches available to perform automatic payment allocation with Japan Invoice Summary:

(i)  Using Virtual Account (e.g., Bank Country Code, Bank Code, Virtual Account Number)

(ii) Using Alternative Name, Counterparty Bank Name, and Counterparty Bank Branch Name

I have configured option (ii) in the customer master data and successfully tested automatic payment reconciliation upon uploading the ZENGINKYO bank statement.

However, I would like to clarify the following points regarding option (ii):

  • During testing, I realized that the Alternative Name must exactly match the name maintained in the customer master for the reconciliation to proceed successfully. In practice, the ZENGINKYO bank statement may include additional details such as invoice numbers or internal notes appended to the payer name.
    → Therefore, may I further confirm if there is any tolerance or flexibility in matching the Alternative Name field? Or is a 100% exact match required?

Additionally:

  • When using the standard automatic payment reconciliation with Japan Invoice Summary (option ii),
    → Is it still necessary to maintain processing rules in the “Manage Processing Rules – For Bank Statements” app?
    In our test scenario, once I had configured a processing rule, the standard automatic payment reconciliation failed. I appreciate your confirmation on whether these rules are required or if they interfere with the standard Japan Invoice Summary logic.

Please also find the blog link(s) below for reference on the setup and behavior of automatic payment reconciliation using Japan Invoice Summary.

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/%E7%B7%A0%E3%82%81%E8%AB%8B%E6%B1%82%E3%82%92%E4%BD%BF%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E5%85%A5%E9%87%91%E8%87%AA%E5%8B%95%E6%B6%88%E8%BE%BC%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6%E3%81%AE%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A8%E3%82%81/ba-p/13574735

Thanks in advance !

Regards,

Hong Yik

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance FIN (Finance)

entry.title: Clearing program J_3RCALD doesnt apply FIFO method
entry.content:
Hello,

We are having an issue following the FIFO method for customer payments, when a credit memo invoice is posted for a customer. The order of the documents to clear is changing , not following the FIFO method, when a credit memo exists. The credit memo is created with a reference to an invoice.

In the clearing program J_3RCALD, Partial payment is selected as clearing process, and in OB74 we have not selected any rule for account type D, leaving it blank.

How can the FIFO method still apply, even when a credit memo invoice is posted?

FBL5N:

In an example, the doc number in yellow, which is third in order to clear, according to the incoming payment, is not selected in the clearing program:

Also, Q3 is the credit memo document

J3RCALD:

 

Thank you,

entry.title: Remove a profit center in T.code GR55
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

In the GR55, User wants to remove a profit center, which the user informs us it is non-exist and does not want in the report.

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Bill of exchange payment request print out in France (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello,

in France (and as far as I know also in Spain and Italy) specific type of bill of exchange is used to collect incoming payments (LCR/Lettre de change classique). It's a special bills of exchange receivable that requires printing BoE paper by us (seller), instead of customer. This bill is then sent to the customer and must be returned signed by him.

For that purpose new payment method with special G/L BoE indicator = 'R' was created in SSCUI = 101972

Set Up Payment Methods for Each Country/Region for Payment Transactions). This method works fine and after successful payment run a noted item with special G/L =R is created.
Unfortunately, I don't see anywhere in the system or in the S4HC documentation any option to generate a BoE request printout. The ‘Bill of Exchange’ step in ‘Output parameter determination’ refers to the BoE presentation, rather than sending the document to the customer for acceptance.

Is there any predefined template for printing BoE request? Is there an option in Public Cloud to print such a document? What application object should be used for assigning print out template?

 

Thank you very much in advance for any support in this matter.

entry.title: Error in posting Gl entry
entry.content:
I am trying to do a posting and I am getting the this error

No Amount tolerance range entered for your company code XXXX. Even after completed tolerance grp

entry.title: Cancel Mat Doc Error - Deficit of MCHB-CLABS 24,956 L : 4600021186 5065 U007 9203171001
entry.content:
Hi, 
Getting this below error while cancelling a material document. 

Deficit of MCHB-CLABS 24,956 L : 4600021186 5065 U007 9203171001 

The above issue resolved. However, got another issue while processing - "Posting not possible; incorrect financial transactions of the cmmt item" Message no. FI149

Please help to resolve this issue.

entry.title: FAGLF101-error as “Field BSEG-DMBE3. does not exist in DYNPRO SAPMF05A 0330” through SM35 BDC sessio
entry.content:
In S4J and S4D systems– FAGLF101 transaction is Giving error as “Field BSEG-DMBE3. does not exist in DYNPRO SAPMF05A 0330” when executed through SM35 session.

 

Please Note:

  1. We have NOT defined currency type 30 as "3rd FI Currency" in FINSC_Ledger transaction.
  2. S4J system is on "SAP 2021 version" and S4D system is recently upgraded to "2023 version support pack 108".

entry.title: remove customizing from OABC
entry.content:
hi,

we did some customizing for depreciation area for investment measures by accident in OABC. But we cannot remove it by error AC528. setting it to warning in OBA5 doesn't help.

How can we remove the wrong customizing?

kr

Nico

entry.title: FAGLF101 Not Posting Journal Entry – Empty Posting List
entry.content:
Hi FI Experts,

I am facing an issue with FAGLF101 where the Posting List remains empty, and no journal entry documents are being generated. I've already checked the following:

  • Configuration settings in OBBU, OBBV, OBBW, and OBBX
  • Sort Method and Account Determination for receivables and payables
  • Message Log while executing with "Generate Posting"
  • Technical Adjustment Accounts (not reconciliation accounts)
  • Period Open Status for reversal postings

Despite these checks, the system is still not generating any postings. Has anyone encountered this before, and is there a specific setting or step I might have missed?

Any insights or troubleshooting tips would be greatly appreciated!

Let me know if you'd like me to refine this further.

Hope you get the solution soon!

entry.title: Financial budget, specifically GL-based budgeting.
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm currently working on an SAP Public Cloud implementation, and my client requires a financial budget, specifically GL-based budgeting. How can I achieve this requirement in the SAP system?

Thanks

Ragavan

entry.title: Error Message FZ 376 : Error in withholding tax calculation S/4HANA
entry.content:
HI Everyone,

We have WHT activated. The WHT will be calculated at the time of Invoice posting. I posted some vendor invoices, the WHT got calculated. Now I want to pay the vendor using F110. When I do my proposal I get this Error.

"Message FZ376 - Error in withholding tax calculation". I am not sure why the program is giving such an error.

I found some SAP Notes related to version 4.6, but I would like to know if there are any correction notes applicable to S/4HANA for this issue.

Could anyone help me with this?

Regards,

FG

entry.title: Hi there, the learning hub subscription. finance do they have config GRP RPT and cashflow? Thx.
entry.content:
Hi there, the learning hub for finance does have all the process configuration sets or only front end execution?

Thanks,

AA.

entry.title: How to administrate change documents?
entry.content:
The below Change Document data needs to be retained/archived:

User Change Data:

  • Change history for logon data - USH02
  • Change history for authorizations - USH04
  • Change history for authorization profiles - USH10
  • Change history for authorization values - USH12

 

Role Change Data:

  • CDHDR
  • CDPOS


Kindly advise on how the data can be transferred as CDHDR, CDPOS also contains Change logs from another table as well.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: GR55 opens excel sheet while executing
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

When the user is executing T.code GR55, excel sheet or spreadsheet opens up without displaying any data.

The user does not want this excel sheet to open up and data should be display. we are in ECC 6.0

Please suggest.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Re: Bank Statement upload using Web Services
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

To setup or upload the payload in your SAP Business ByDesign system, you need to have an external application to integrate/ send your XML payload into the ByDesign system. Also, to perform any tests with the payload you can use for example the "SOAPUI" application. 

You can check more details about the system integration configuration in the help document below:

Communication Arrangements Quick Guide
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/7c182c462ec043cba338a30b952068c7/2dd4cb73722d1014938ec0c0927d57ed.html?locale=en-US

Check the example below of a test payload in ByD system:

Downloading the WSDL:

  1. Go to Application and User Management Work Center.
  2. Go to Service Explorer View.
  3. In the search field, insert Manage Bank Statements.
  4. Click on Download WSDL button.
  5. The WSDL will be downloaded.

Creating the SOAP Project:

  1. Open the SOAP UI.
  2. Click on File on the top left.
  3. Click on New SOAP Project.
  4. In the Project Name field, insert the project name (any name)
  5. In the Initial WSDL field, click on the browse button.
  6. Select the WSDL file downloaded previously.
  7. Click Ok.
  8. The project will be created, under the projects tab.

Creating the payload:

  1. Expand the project created.
  2. Expand "binding".
  3. Expand MaintainBundle.
  4. Click on Request 1.
  5. Delete the text in the left of the request window.
  6. Paste the query payload in the left text field of the request window.

Note: You can use as an example the payload as per documentation below:

Inbound Service Manage Bank Statements
https://help.sap.com/doc/a2b4c7ef61d64397b2b1d052082a8a08/2408/en-US/PSM_ISI_R_II_FOP_MANAGE_BANK_STMNT_IN.html

Then:

  1. Click on Auth sub-tab, under the request window.
  2. On the Authorization dropdown and select "Add New Authorization".
  3. Select the type Basic.
  4. In the username and password insert the technical user.
  5. Click on the Green Play button on the top of the request window.
  6. The payload will be sent.
  7. On the Right Text box of the Request window click on "XML" sub-tab.

After that you will be able to create and edit the Bank Statements in your system.

 

Best regards,  
Ihan
SAP Product Support

entry.title: VAT Reporting issue Germany
entry.content:
HI Everyone,

I have a German customer with company code 2000 the VAT reporting is quarterly. SAP gives monthly declarations. And on top none of the steps are available to execute the transaction. SAP gives immediately 'submitted to government'

 

Please kindly advise

Keem

entry.title: Unable to Display Physically Deleted WBS Elements
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

Certain WBS elements were physically deleted (not just flagged for deletion), and we have noticed that the flagging option (logical deletion) was disabled at the time. As a result, these elements do not appear in the PRPS table.

We are now in a situation where we would like to reuse the same WBS codes that were used by the deleted elements. However, since they were physically deleted, we are unable to retrieve or confirm their previous existence 

Looking forward for your help.

Mohamed El Amine AOURAGH

entry.title: KKAQ and Trial balance mismatch
entry.content:
Hii Team

When I execute the KKAQ report plant-wise (1000, 1001, 1002, 1003) and compare it with the working process under the trial balance based on profit center-wise data (plant and profit center are the same), I noticed the following:

  • For plants 1000 and 1001, the figures in the KKAQ report do not match the trial balance.

  • For plants 1002 and 1003, the figures are matching.

Could you please suggest how to check and identify the reason for the mismatch?

entry.title: 历史导入固定资产减值业务如何操作
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

     请问历史导入固定资产减值业务如何操作呢,针对非历史导入资产,可以通过APP(过账资产重估)操作,但对历史导入资产操作时会报错,具体如附件截图,谢谢!
